items.content_html: F10(suspend/resume process). F12(on/off borderless fullscreen). F11(un/lock mouse cursor in active window). Pause(ALT+F4/hold restarts PC). Control 4button Mouse with keyboard. Insert a character by long pressing the key. LWin(CTRL+F, hold/double shows/hide taskbar). Menu(CTRL+C/V/A). ALT+Shift(half window size+position+maximize). ALT+Ctrl(desktop)
items.title: hornster02/hornster02: F10(suspend/resume process). F12(on/off borderless fullscreen). F11(un/lock mouse cursor in active window). Pause(ALT+F4/hold restarts PC). Control 4button Mouse with keyboard. Insert a character by long pressing the key. LWin(CTRL+F, hold/double shows/hide taskbar). Menu(CTRL+C/V/A). ALT+Shift(half window size+position+maximize). ALT+Ctrl(desktop)

items.content_html: Firefox 2-119 (2006-2023) compact CSS (-40/30%↕️/↔️) 1/2/3 lines. Option to overlay the address bar with find in page bar. Row colors (names,icons) in the address bar for bookmarks+opened tabs. Bold font for some context menu entries. 🔉 instead of playing. 2x more pinned tabs(same↔️). SquareWeb+UI. 🚫animations. Custom scrollbars. about:config+ahk
items.title: hornster02/Firefox-Three-Rows-Simple-Compact-Clean-CSS: Firefox 2-119 (2006-2023) compact CSS (-40/30%↕️/↔️) 1/2/3 lines. Option to overlay the address bar with find in page bar. Row colors (names,icons) in the address bar for bookmarks+opened tabs. Bold font for some context menu entries. 🔉 instead of playing. 2x more pinned tabs(same↔️). SquareWeb+UI. 🚫animations. Custom scrollbars. about:config+ahk

items.content_html: HTpy is a custom scripting language that transpiles ahk like syntax into Python scripts. It enables users to write simple scripts using HTpy syntax and convert them into executable Python code.
items.title: TheMaster1127/HTpy: HTpy is a custom scripting language that transpiles ahk like syntax into Python scripts. It enables users to write simple scripts using HTpy syntax and convert them into executable Python code.

items.content_html: HT++ is a statically-typed programming language that transpiles to C++. It features an AutoHotkey-like syntax with static types, blending ease of use with C++'s performance. This allows for the development of efficient and versatile scripts that can run on any device where C++ is supported, ensuring compatibility across every platform.
items.title: TheMaster1127/HT-plus-plus: HT++ is a statically-typed programming language that transpiles to C++. It features an AutoHotkey-like syntax with static types, blending ease of use with C++'s performance. This allows for the development of efficient and versatile scripts that can run on any device where C++ is supported, ensuring compatibility across every platform.
